title: Tokens: distinguish local alert threshold from real provider budget
description: The /tokens page currently shows a daily budget warning based only on a local UI threshold, which can be confused with a real provider/account spending limit. Update the page so it clearly separates local alert threshold from actual provider budget/spend data. If possible, add provider-aware budget visibility or explicitly mark that provider budget is not yet connected.
